hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"git push"*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"AUTOMATED POST-PUSH AUDIT POLICY: a git push just completed. Unless an audit agent from this policy is already running this session for the same changes, launch ONE background general-purpose agent now with the full prompt from prompts/repo_audit.md (read-only audit, markdown report as its final message). When it completes, write its report to report_audit.md and give the user a short summary of the top findings."}}' ;; esac
